hypotheses.name: Random Gaussian embedding null control for SV2 co-pole
hypotheses.method: Replace scGPT layer_gene_embeddings.npy [12,4803,512] with random Gaussian (seed=42, same shape). Run identical SV2 co-pole test for 3092 STRING pairs (score>=0.4): K=52 top/bottom poles, 300 shuffle nulls per layer. Report n_sig/12 layers and mean z-score.
hypotheses.next_action: Report as confirmatory null: random embeddings yield z~0 confirming scGPT PPI geometry is model-specific. Include in paper as model-specificity control.

hypotheses.name: Out-of-sample PPI precision@k prediction benchmark
hypotheses.method: Use SV2 projections of 209 named genes at each of 12 layers. Compute negative absolute distance |proj_i - proj_j| as pairwise similarity. Rank all 21736 pairs. Compute precision@k at k=50,100,200,500,1000 for STRING edges. Compare to random baseline (14.23%). Report enrichment = P@k / baseline.
hypotheses.result_value: P@100=0.170 vs random=0.142, enrichment=1.20x (consistent across all 12 layers)
hypotheses.next_action: Negative for ranking framing. The SV2 axis is a partition metric (co-pole), not a distance metric. Try co-pole membership as ranking signal in next iteration. Report as methodological insight: SVD pole structure is not equivalent to a ranking distance.

hypotheses.name: scGPT attention co-occurrence geometry for STRING/TRRUST pairs
hypotheses.method: Load aggregated scGPT attention_scores.npy [8181x8181] from lung processed.h5ad. Map 208 named genes to correct attention matrix positions via adata.var_names. Compute mean symmetric attention (att[i,j]+att[j,i])/2 for STRING pairs, TRRUST activation pairs, and non-STRING background pairs within 209-gene universe. Run Mann-Whitney U test (one-sided, greater). Also compute STRING confidence quintile gradient (Spearman rho).
hypotheses.result_value: STRING: z=0.066, MW_p=0.091 (not significant). TRRUST activation: MW_p=9.9e-09, mean_att=0.01762 vs null=0.00889 (~2x enrichment). STRING quintile gradient rho=0.10 (p=0.87, not significant).
hypotheses.next_action: New finding: scGPT attention encodes TF regulatory co-occurrence (TRRUST act, MW_p=9.9e-09, 2x enrichment) but NOT PPI proximity (STRING z~0). This is mechanistically complementary to SVD geometry: attention=regulatory, SVD=PPI. Plan: test TRRUST repression separately, and test per-layer attention if available.
